headline: Analog Devices Redefines Growth With Systems Platforms Across AI And Autos
summary: Analog Devices (NasdaqGS:ADI) is reshaping its role in semiconductors through recent acquisitions and systems-level platforms such as its Andromeda AI offering. The company is pushing deeper into industrial automation, automotive, and AI-enabled data centers, including work on wireless battery management. These moves mark a shift from component supplier to broader solutions provider across key application areas. For investors watching NasdaqGS:ADI at a share price of $315.81, the story is...
